author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered both features. Pre-OOM hooks: MemoryHook with priority/overhead/callback, safe_alloc_with_hooks, PressureLevel with listeners, budget enforcement. ONNX export: hand-written protobuf encoder, all IR ops mapped to ONNX, opset 17+, export_onnx() one-call API. 101 GPU + 87 serialize tests passing.
